issue.explanation: Lint will report this issue if it is configured with an issue id it does not recognize in for example Gradle files or `lint.xml` configuration files.
Lint will report this issue if it is configured with an issue id it does not recognize in for example Gradle files or `lint.xml` configuration files.

issue.message: Switch statement on an `int` with known associated constant missing case `Player.STATE_IDLE`
issue.explanation: This check warns if a `switch` statement does not explicitly include all the values declared by the typedef `@IntDef` declaration.
